title: Most sessions vanish the moment your wetsuit comes off.
lede: You paddle out, you surf, you drive home. No record of where you sat, what you read in the swell, or what you actually did differently. Surf Reader closes that loop — quickly, on the beach, in the language you think in.

cards.title: You read the lineup, then forget what you saw.
cards.body: Sand banks shift, rips appear, peaks drift. Surf Reader turns your eyes-on-the-water into a saved beach map you can pull up before paddling out.

cards.title: You surf without an intention.
cards.body: "Just have fun" is a great mantra and a poor session plan. The guided 7-question flow gives you one specific thing to work on this paddle.

cards.title: You never honestly rate yourself.
cards.body: Seven criteria, one to five stars. The average becomes your Skill Rating. Trends emerge. Excuses don't.
